title: Fact
description: A discrete claim with a source and confidence. Use for atomic, citeable knowledge.

claim.description: The statement itself, written so it can be evaluated in isolation.

source.description: URL, document id, person, or other origin of the claim.

expires_at.description: Optional staleness horizon; past this the fact should be re-verified.

contradicts.description: Stable ids of facts this one disagrees with.
